[[File:Foreign.svg|thumb]]
Foreign entrapment is one of the [[nine plagues]]. It is the plague of being stuck with alien values or ideas keeping you disconnected from the world.<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref> 

It's solution may be to realize the idea is malattuning you and it's source

As it is a [[New plagues|new plague]] it does not have a well defined [[booster shot]] against it yet, although the booster shot is linked to [[larping]] and [[gnosis]] and a subtype of the booster shot of [[enstuckment]].

[[antibodies]] are the proposed [[booster shot]]


Fighting [[samscars]] may be seen as an intrinsic part of escaping foreign enstuckment

It is having some kind of foreign body inside your mind which impedes it. 

Can be an outdated idea from a previous mode of being. For example an adult having difficulties with relationships due to inheriting ideas from when they were abused as a child. 

== Examples ==

* [[insecure attachment]]
** [[avoidant attachment]]
** [[anxious attachment]]
** [[disorganized attachment]]
* [[internalized prejudice]]
** [[internalized homophobia]]
** [[internalized transphobia]]
*[[Samscars]] in general

== References ==


[[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Locking]][[Category:Foreign entrapment]]
[[sn:Locking]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Locking]]
[[Category:Pages]]
